title: Textured Mace Enchants (Density & Breach)
description: Gives breach and density enchants their own unique textures without requiring optifine or CIT
body:
**📦 Breach & Density Enchantment Textures**

This resource pack gives Breach and Density enchantments their own unique item textures — no OptiFine, no CIT, and no mods required.
Everything works using vanilla, so it’s compatible with Fabric, Forge, and pure vanilla Minecraft.

**✨ Features**
- Custom texture for Breach-enchanted items
- Custom texture for Density-enchanted items
- Works in pure vanilla (no renaming needed)
- Lightweight and server-friendly

**📌 Supported Versions**
- Minecraft 1.21.8

**🔧 How It Works**

Minecraft automatically detects the enchantment and swaps the item model — simple and seamless.

**⚠️ DISCLAIMER** The textures were not made by me!
